description_long: This is a tall, rectangular metal cabinet with four short legs, designed for urban or industrial environments. The front features two upper doors with large glass panels, allowing visibility into the upper compartment, and two lower solid metal doors for concealed storage. The cabinet is painted a light gray color, with the interior of the upper section finished in a striking blue, creating a visual contrast. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The cabinet is likely constructed from steel or another durable metal, with glass used for the upper door panels. Its sturdy build and lockable doors make it suitable for secure storage in garages, workshops, or public facilities.
description: A tall, gray metal cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors and solid lower doors, standing on four short legs. The interior of the upper section is blue, providing a striking contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled upper doors, two solid lower doors, and the blue interior of the upper compartment.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and plain, solid metal side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, solid metal back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain metal side.
